meanings.example: I do compliance reviews every Monday.
meanings.exampleKo: 저는 매주 월요일 컴플라이언스 검토를 합니다.

meanings.example: Could you do the KYC update for this merchant?
meanings.exampleKo: 이 가맹점 KYC 업데이트 좀 처리해주실래요?

meanings.example: This draft will do for the first review.

chunks.example: We don't do business with high-risk jurisdictions.
We do due diligence on every new merchant.
I'll do my best to meet the deadline.
This account has nothing to do with the flagged case.
We can't do without proper transaction monitoring tools.

pronTip.title: DO 동사 발음 핵심
points: did [딛] — d 소리 두 번, 짧게
강조 do: 'I DO know' [아이 두 노우] — do에 강세!

listening.title: AML 신규 가맹점 실사 시나리오
listening.source: AML 업무 + Cambridge Dictionary 청크 검증
listening.fullText: Manager: Did you do the due diligence on the new merchant? Staff: Yes, I did. They have nothing to do with the previous flagged group. Manager: Good. Do we do business with their parent company? Staff: We don't. I'll do my best to finish the report by tomorrow. Manager: We can't do without a clean audit trail.

blanks.suffix: you do the due diligence on the new merchant?
. They have nothing to do with the previous flagged group.
we do business with their parent company?
. I'll do my best to finish the report by tomorrow.
my best to finish the report by tomorrow.

examples5.label: 행위
examples5.en: I do my morning email check before standup.
examples5.ko: 스탠드업 미팅 전에 아침 이메일 확인을 합니다.

examples5.label: 처리
examples5.en: Could you do the merchant onboarding for me today?
examples5.ko: 오늘 제 대신 가맹점 온보딩 좀 처리해주실래요?

examples5.label: 실사
examples5.en: We do enhanced due diligence on all PEP clients.

examples5.label: 관련성
examples5.en: This alert has nothing to do with money laundering.

examples5.label: 최선
examples5.en: I'll do my best to clear the backlog this week.
examples5.ko: 이번 주 안에 백로그 처리에 최선을 다하겠습니다.

writing5.ko: 저는 매주 월요일에 컴플라이언스 검토를 합니다.
writing5.en: I do compliance reviews every Monday.

writing5.ko: 이 가맹점 KYC 업데이트 좀 처리해주실래요?
writing5.en: Could you do the KYC update for this merchant?

writing5.ko: 우리는 모든 신규 가맹점에 대해 실사를 수행합니다.
writing5.en: We do due diligence on every new merchant.

writing5.ko: 이 계좌는 신고된 케이스와는 관련이 없습니다.
writing5.en: This account has nothing to do with the flagged case.
writing5.hint: 청크: have nothing to do with

writing5.ko: 저는 마감일을 지키기 위해 최선을 다하겠습니다.
writing5.en: I'll do my best to meet the deadline.

challenge3sec.ko: 저는 매일 아침 트랜잭션 모니터링을 합니다.
challenge3sec.en: I do transaction monitoring every morning.
This transaction has nothing to do with money laundering.
We don't do business with high-risk countries.

challenge3sec.ko: 저희는 모든 신규 고객에게 실사를 합니다.
challenge3sec.en: We do due diligence on every new client.
We can't do without proper tools.

freewrite.situation: 신규 가맹점 온보딩 시 본인 팀이 어떤 실사 절차를 수행하는지 영어로 설명하세요. 어떤 작업을 하고, 어떤 거래는 거절하며, 어떤 도구·자료가 필수인지 DO 동사 + 오늘 배운 청크를 사용해서 3-5문장으로 작성해보세요.
freewrite.hint: 활용: do due diligence, do business with, do one's best, do without
freewrite.placeholder: 예: When we onboard a new merchant, we do enhanced due diligence on every applicant. We don't do business with companies linked to sanctioned jurisdictions...

office.info:
🏢 사내 미팅
업무 분담, 진행 상황 확인, 문제 해결 — DO 동사가 행위·처리의 핵심!

dialog.text: Who's doing the merchant review this week?
I'll do it. I have time on Wednesday afternoon.
Great. Just do your best — it's a complex case.
Did you do the audit prep for tomorrow?
I did. The folder is on the shared drive.
Perfect. Let me know if there's anything else I should do.
Our current onboarding process takes too long. We can't do without automation any longer.
What exactly do you want to automate?
The CDD checks. Right now we do them manually for every merchant — it's not sustainable.
Does the current vendor do that kind of integration?
They do. I did a demo last week. It would cut our review time by half.
Sounds promising. Let's do a pilot with 10 merchants first.

rolePlay.scenario: 운영기획팀과 협업 회의에서 AML 팀의 실사 프로세스 개선안을 제안하세요. 현재 무엇을 수행하는지, 어떤 도구가 부족한지, 어떻게 개선할지 DO 동사로 설명하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Thanks for joining. I heard you wanted to discuss the CDD workflow. Walk me through what your team currently does, and where you think we can do better.

email.info:
📧 이메일·메시지
업무 요청, 진행 보고, 거절 — 격식 갖춘 DO 동사 활용!

dialog.text: Hi, could you do me a favor and review this CDD form?
Sure, I'll do it this afternoon.
Thanks! I'll do the same for you anytime.
Have you done the analysis I asked for?
I did the first half. I'll do the rest by EOD.
Great, no rush. Just do your best.
Hi, we'd like to set up a payment account for our overseas business. Do you do business with companies in our region?
Thanks for reaching out. Unfortunately, we don't do business with merchants in that jurisdiction due to our risk policy.
I see. Is there anything we can do to qualify?
We do enhanced due diligence case-by-case, but it would require additional documentation.
What kind of documents do you need?
I'll send a checklist. Please understand we have to do this thoroughly to meet our regulatory obligations.

rolePlay.scenario: 외국 가맹점 후보가 한국 PG사와 거래를 원하지만 본사 위치가 고위험 국가입니다. 회사 정책에 따라 정중하게 답변하되, 가능한 대안이 있다면 안내하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Sales Director from a Southeast Asian e-commerce company
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi, my company is based in [high-risk jurisdiction] and we'd like to expand into Korea. Do you do business with companies from our region? We've heard your team is thorough — what would we need to do to qualify?

aml.info:
🚨 AML 실무
실사 수행, 케이스 처리, 관련성 분석 — DO 동사 핵심 활용!

dialog.text: Did you do the CDD on the three new merchants?
I did. Two passed, one needs EDD.
Good. Do the EDD this week if possible.
Does this account have anything to do with case #2026-0419?
It doesn't. I checked — completely separate beneficial owner.
Good. We don't want to do anything that confuses the timeline.
Walk me through what your team did before filing this STR.
We did the standard CDD first. When we saw the cross-border pattern, we did EDD on the beneficial owner.
Did you do business with this merchant before?
We did, for about 18 months. Volume was normal until last quarter.
Did the abnormal volume have anything to do with their parent company restructuring?
We considered that. Our analysis shows it has nothing to do with restructuring — the counterparties are entirely new.
Understood. We'll do a deeper review on our end.

rolePlay.scenario: FIU에서 본인 팀의 CDD/EDD 실사 절차에 대한 검사 인터뷰가 진행됩니다. 무엇을 수행했는지, 어떤 분석을 했는지, 무엇이 무관한지 DO 동사를 활용해 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Good morning. We're doing a thematic review on PG company AML practices. Can you walk me through what your team typically does when onboarding a high-risk merchant, and what you did differently in the case you filed last month?

social.info:
🌍 비즈니스 사교
업무 소개, 의견 교환, 관심사 공유 — 부드러운 DO 동사!

dialog.text: What do you do for a living?
I do AML compliance at a Korean PG company.
Interesting! What does that involve day to day?
What did you do last weekend?
Not much. I did some reading and caught up on rest.
That sounds nice. I should do that more often.
How do Korean PGs typically do their merchant screening?
We do a layered approach — automated screening first, then manual review for high-risk cases.
Do you do business with crypto exchanges?
We don't, actually. Our risk appetite doesn't allow it yet.
Same here. Does that have anything to do with the recent FATF guidance?
Partly, yes. But we'd done that policy before the guidance — we just couldn't do without an extra approval layer.

rolePlay.scenario: ACAMS 컨퍼런스 커피 브레이크에서 다른 나라 컴플라이언스 담당자와 각국 PG/은행의 실사 관행에 대해 자연스럽게 의견을 나누세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Priya, AML Manager at an Indian payments company
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi! Priya, from Bangalore. I noticed you're from a Korean PG. We're doing a benchmarking study on how PGs in Asia do their CDD. Mind if I ask how your team handles it?

daily.info:
😊 일상 응용
주말 활동, 운동, 가족 일 — 가장 친숙한 DO 동사 패턴!

dialog.text: What do you do to stay active?
I do yoga twice a week. It's the only thing I can do consistently.
Nice! I should do something too.
Did you do the laundry?
I did. I'll do the dishes after dinner.
Thanks. You've been doing a lot lately.
What did you do over the weekend?
We did a lot, actually. Took the kids to the park, did some grocery shopping.
Sounds like a busy weekend!
It was. But honestly, I don't know what I'd do without weekends.
Same. Does your family do anything special on Sundays?
We usually do brunch together. Nothing fancy, but it's our thing.

rolePlay.scenario: 외국인 동료와 점심 식사 자리에서 평소 일상, 가족 시간, 취미 활동에 대해 자연스럽게 이야기하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Tom, a colleague visiting from the London office
rolePlay.aiOpening: So tell me about life outside work in Korea! What do you usually do on weekends? Anything you do regularly with the family?
